title: Internal Operating Support Packet 026
public_claim: This page records that the operating system includes internal capacity and continuity supports, but the public version deliberately abstracts the private contents.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: Its value is internal continuity, not public display: it preserves operating context that can support later rooms without being mistaken for a finished public project.

minimum_public_demo: Test one representative case; confirm input (private page inventory, public audience, and excluded...) produces output (states the professional support function without...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
